name: hermes-studio
description: Hermes — an agent-driven music video studio (kudbee)

scripts.build: npm run analyze && npm run timeline && npm run render
scripts.smoke: node studio/render.mjs --pack retrowave --start 46 --end 48 --out out/smoke.mp4 --preset ultrafast --crf 30 && node studio/qa.mjs out/smoke.mp4 --slice
scripts.lint:check: node --check studio/render.mjs && node --check studio/build-timeline.mjs && node --check studio/analyze.mjs && node --check studio/align.mjs && node --check studio/prep-frames.mjs && node --check studio/brain.mjs && node --check studio/qa.mjs && node --check bin/hermes
